title: Fig. 3 in Vocalization Development in Geoffroy's bat, Myotis emarginatus (Chiroptera: Vespertilionidae)
author: Mehdizadeh, Robab
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Spectrogram of vocalization types of isolation calls in Myotis emarginatus pups, which include single-syllable (classic, sinusoid, CF-tail and UP-tail-FM) and double-syllable (FM and FM, CF-tail and FM and UP-tail-FM and FM) calls.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. Spectrogram of vocalization types of isolation calls in Myotis emarginatus pups, which include single-syllable (classic, sinusoid, CF-tail and UP-tail-FM) and double-syllable (FM and FM, CF-tail and FM and UP-tail-FM and FM) calls.
